message.entry: Breakpoint encountered in file {0} at line {1,number,integer}, has been suppressed by {2}.
MATLAB debugger can only stop in MATLAB code files, and "{0}" is not a MATLAB code file.\n Instead, the debugger will stop at the point right before "{1}" is called.
Entering debug mode is only supported within running MATLAB code files.
NaN/Inf breakpoint hit for {0} on line {1,number,integer}.
{0} is not currently in a debuggable state. Skipping the frame.
Position {0} is not a valid position to step into on this line.
Line {0,number,integer} column {1,number,integer} is not a valid position to step into on this line.
A problem occurred while attempting to step in.

entry.note: Refers to what function the stack frame is in
Refers to what function the stack frame is in

message.entry: Value must be a positive integer scalar less than 2^31.
Unable to add or modify variable. Current workspace is read-only for function argument validation.
